web.branding.current_label_modelvalue_cl.text: Ko te {0} o nāianei: {1}. Pāwhiri ki te huri i ngā kōwhiringa.

web.branding.preview_of_the_secret_link_.text: Arokite o te tirohanga a te kaiwhiwhi ina urunga ki tō hononga haumaru

web.branding.switch_to_safari_browser_vi.text: Huri ki te tirohanga tirotiro Safari

web.branding.switch_to_edge_browser_view.text: Huri ki te tirohanga tirotiro Edge

web.branding.example_pre_reveal_instruct.text: Whakamahia tō waea hei matawai i te waehere QR

web.branding.example_post_reveal_instruc.text: Whakapā atu ki onboarding{'@'}example.com mō ngā pātai

web.branding.these_instructions_will_be_.text: Ka whakaaturia ēnei tohutohu ki ngā kaiwhiwhi i mua i tā rātou whakaatu i te ihirangi karere huna
Ka whakaaturia ēnei tohutohu ki ngā kaiwhiwhi i muri i tā rātou whakaatu i te karere huna

web.branding.click_to_upload_a_logo_with.text: Pāwhiri hei whakahaere i tō tohu. Rahi tūtohua: 128x128 pika. Rahi kōnae mōrahi: 1MB. Ngā hōputu tautoko: PNG, JPG, SVG

web.branding.loading_preview.text: E uta ana i te arokite...

web.branding.preview_how_recipients_will.text: Titiro tīpako ka pēhea te kitenga o ō karere huna e ngā kaiwhiwhi mā te whakamātau i te pātene "Tirohia te Karere Huna"

web.branding.click_the_preview_image_bel.text: Pāwhiri te awhiata arokite i raro nei ki te whakahou i tō tohu (tūtohu 128x128 ngā pika, 1MB max)

web.branding.use_the_controls_above_to_c.text: Whakamahia ngā tohutoro i runga ake ki te whakarite i te tae waitohu, ngā kāhua, me ngā tohutohu kaiwhiwhi

web.branding.you_have_unsaved_changes_ar.text: Kei a koe ngā huringa kāore anō kia tiakina. Kei te tino hiahia koe?

web.branding.failed_to_load_brand_settin.text: I rahua te uta i ngā tautuhinga waitohu

web.branding.this_is_an_interactive_prev.text: He arokite tauwhitwhiti tēnei o te āhua ka kite ai ngā kaiwhiwhi i ō karere haumaru. Ka taea e koe: - Te whakaritenga i ngā tae me ngā momotuhi mā ngā whakahaere kei runga - Te tukuake moko (e tūtohu ana te 128x128 pika iti rawa, 1MB te nui rawa) - Te whakamātau i te arokite mā te pātene "Tirohia te Karere Huna"

He arokite pāhekoheko tēnei o te pēhea e kite ai ngā kaiwhiwhi i ō karere haumaru. Ka taea e koe te: - Whakarite i ngā tae me ngā momotuhi mā ngā tohutoro i runga ake - Tukuake i tētahi tohu (tūtohu 128x128 ngā pika, 1MB max) - Whakamātau i te arokite mā te pātene "Tirohia te Karere Huna"

web.branding.default_logo_icon.text: Kanji Hapanīhi '秘' (himitsu) ko te tikanga 'huna' 'matatapu' rānei

web.branding.upgrade_to_customize.text: Whakapikia tō mahere hei whakariterite i te waitohu mō tēnei rohe.

web.branding.keyhole_logo_icon.text: Ata pūwhare e tohu ana i te tohatoha haumaru, tūmataiti

web.branding.logo_field_hint.text: Arokitea i mua i te ora o ō huringa.

web.branding.logo_modal_hint.text: PNG, JPG, SVG rānei. Tūtohua 128x128px, tae atu ki te 1MB.

web.branding.image_invalid_type.text: Kāore taua momo kōnae e tautokona. Tēnā, kōwhiria he whakaahua.

web.branding.image_too_large.text: He rahi rawa te whakaahua. Ko te rahi mōrahi ko {max}.

web.branding.image_will_be_removed.text: Ka tangohia tēnei tohu ina tiaki koe.

web.branding.image_upload_failed.text: I hē tētahi mea. Tēnā, ngana anō.

web.branding.path_match_tag.text: Tāruatia ngā tautuhinga mai i tētahi pae kua tū.

web.branding.path_advanced_tag.text: Hangaia tāu ake CSS Tailwind v4.

web.branding.your_brand_subtitle.text: He kōwhiringa tere torutoru — mā mātou te toenga.

web.branding.paths_carryover_hint.text: He arokite ora tēnei — kāore ō huringa e kitea e ngā manuhiri kia tiaki rā anō koe.

web.branding.coming_soon_match_blurb.text: Tohua mai tō paetukutuku, ka pānui mātou i ōna tae me ōna momotuhi, kātahi ka kati i te āputa i te pāwhiri kotahi.

web.branding.coming_soon_advanced_blurb.text: Whakatikahia ngā tokena {'@'}theme Tailwind v4 tōtika, whakapiritia rānei tāu ake pepa kāhua.

web.branding.tile_no_create.text: Kāore e taea e ngā manuhiri te waihanga karere huna ki konei.

web.branding.recipient_page_content_hint.text: Ngā tohutohu reo me te whakaatu ka whakaaturia ki ngā kaiwhiwhi i tēnei rohe.

web.branding.delivery_language_hint.text: Taunoa mō ngā whārangi kaiwhiwhi me ngā īmēra i tēnei rohe. Ka taea e ngā kaiwhiwhi te huri reo i te whārangi.

web.branding.delivery_reveal_instruction.text: Ka whakaaturia i te whārangi kaiwhiwhi. Waiho wātea hei whakamahi i te kuputuhi tōmua i te reo kua tīpakohia.
